mapper.select: SELECT YEAR(l.year) AS year, l.semester AS semester, l.type AS lectureType, l.name AS lectureName, l.credit AS credit, c.grade_letter AS gradeLetter, CASE c.grade_letter WHEN 'A' THEN '4.5' WHEN 'B' THEN '3.5' WHEN 'C' THEN '3.0' WHEN 'D' THEN '2.5' WHEN 'F' THEN '0.0' ELSE '-' END AS finalScore FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id WHERE c.member_id = #{loginUserId} ORDER BY l.year DESC, l.semester DESC
